spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates how scroll-target-group aligns fragment targets.

interactive.rationale: Presents side-by-side columns (with vs without target group) and hooks scrolling/readout listeners interactively.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Directly aligns with the CSS target groups explanation.

references.rationale: Includes relevant spec and ChromeStatus links.

design_system.rationale: Implements tidy flex layout with custom paper borders.

summary: An excellent vertical snap-to-target offset sandbox highlighting scroll-snap offsets side-by-side.
